notes: Blocks that produce or process gases. Currently limited to O2/H2 Generators, which electrolyse ice (and water) into hydrogen and oxygen. These were deliberately excluded from blocks/power.json because they neither produce nor store electricity. Gas tanks live in blocks/storage.json. Build-component quantities are totals (initial + extra welding phases). Gas output rates are published without an explicit unit — stored as raw numbers with gasOutput.unitAsPublished = null. Wiki reports power.maxInput = 0 for both generators; this is almost certainly a wiki omission (electrolysis requires energy) and is flagged in dataGaps.

resources.description: Turns ice and water into hydrogen and oxygen gas.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
dataGaps: power.maxInput (wiki reports 0, almost certainly an oversight)
